gui.solmaiddream.maid_info.exist_time: The time your maid spends with you:
chat.solmaiddream.wish_handler.to_zero_c: Master... pay some attention to me, please...
chat.solmaiddream.wish_handler.to_zero: Fulfillment has been reset to zero!
chat.solmaiddream.wish_handler.reduce_by: Master... if you have time, please spend a bit more time with me, okay...?
Fulfillment has been reduced by half!
chat.solmaiddream.wish_handler.add_two_c: Master! You're so lovely to me~ (nuzzling)
chat.solmaiddream.event.daily_wish_chat: Thank you, Master! I'm so happy~
